scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:split: concurrently --names "api,admin,patient" "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev:admin -w apps/web" "npm run dev:patient -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
